zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger DeMoels於大約1239年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Nicholas de Moéls46歲，母親Hawise de Newmarch30歲。他和Alice Prouz至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1295年6月17日之前在英國英格蘭薩默塞特馬波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger DeMoels于大约1239年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Nicholas de Moéls46岁，母亲Hawise de Newmarch30岁。他和Alice Prouz至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1295年6月17日之前在英国英格兰薩默塞特馬波頓。

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger DeMoels was born about 1239, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas de Moéls, was 46 and his mother, Hawise de Newmarch, was 30. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Alice Prouz. He died before 17 June 1295, in Maperton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger DeMoels est né environ 1239, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Moéls, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Newmarch, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Alice Prouz. Il est décédé avant 17 juin 1295, à Maperton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger DeMoels um 1239 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas de Moéls 46 und seine Mutter Hawise de Newmarch 30. Er hatte mit Alice Prouz mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 17. Juni 1295 in Maperton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger DeMoels è nato il circa 1239 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas de Moéls, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Newmarch, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Alice Prouz. Morì prima del 17 giugno 1295, nel Maperton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger DeMoelsが約1239年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Moélsは46歳，母Hawise de Newmarchは30歳であった。彼はAlice Prouzとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1295年6月17日以前にイギリスイギリスソメルセトマペルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger DeMoels(이)가 대략 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas de Moéls(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Newmarch(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Alice Prouz(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1295년 6월 17일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 마퍼턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger DeMoels nasceu aproximadamente 1239, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Moéls, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Newmarch, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice Prouz. Ele faleceu antes 17 de junho de 1295, em Maperton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger DeMoels родился около 1239 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas de Moéls было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Newmarch, 30. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Alice Prouz. Он умер перед 17 июнь 1295 г. в местности мапиртон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
